author: mark
text:
Forward-compat passthrough on Task and Note structs

Adds #[serde(flatten)] extra maps on Task and Note so a future bl's
top-level fields survive load/save instead of being silently dropped
by serialize_mergeable. Notes are append-only so Note.extra only
needs to survive load. external: BTreeMap stays as the plugin
extension point — extra is strictly for first-party future fields.
